howItWorks.intro: This property tax appeal calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Annual Savings = (Assessed Value - Fair Market Value) x Tax Rate
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How do I know if my property is over-assessed?
faq.answer: Compare your assessed value to recent sales of similar homes (same size, age, condition, neighborhood). If your assessment is 10%+ higher than comparable sales, you likely have grounds for an appeal. Check your county assessor website for comps.

faq.question: What is the success rate for property tax appeals?
faq.answer: About 50-70% of formal appeals result in some reduction. Having 3-5 comparable sales supporting a lower value significantly increases your chances. Many homeowners never appeal, even when over-assessed.

howWeCalculate.intro: This property tax appeal calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
